name: Full Frontend Modernization

goal.answer: Execute the complete MM Pharma frontend modernization across the Next.js App Router, implementing the design system, navbar/footer, SEO/titles, products UX, home sections, admin dashboard, and build hardening defined in the project specs.

criteria.answer:
Admin dashboard exists with guarded route group, shell, and overview KPIs; verified by build and manual navigation check
Navbar and footer match spec-compliant, accessible, token-driven design; verified by visual QA and lint
Design tokens centralized in `theme/` and applied; verified by `scripts/check-tokens.ts` or grep audit
Page titles/metadata follow centralized `lib/seo` convention across all locales; verified by build output and manual inspection
Products pages stabilized with safe DB wrappers, error/empty states, and modernized catalog UI; verified by happy-path test and build
Home page and key sections refreshed with new primitives; verified by visual QA and Lighthouse
Build, lint, and typecheck all pass with warnings mitigated; verified by `next build`, `next lint`, and `tsc --noEmit`
RTL/responsive/a11y validated across locales; verified by Lighthouse >= 90 on key pages

constraints.answer: No new runtime dependencies without explicit user approval, Preserve existing App Router architecture and server/client boundaries, Follow website specs in `website specs/99-rules/*` for spacing, tokens, navbar behavior, and metadata formulas, Maintain tri-locale support (`fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, `en-US`) and RTL behavior, Keep changes surgical but complete across shared layout surfaces

phases.answer: Baseline and build hardening, Design system primitives, Navbar and footer modernization, Page titles and SEO metadata, Products page stabilization and modernization, Admin dashboard implementation, Final polish and validation

assumptions.answer: User has approved the full modernization plan described in AGENTS.md and confirmed completion criteria; The MongoDB URI and Cloudinary credentials exist in the runtime environment even if not present locally; MUI 9 + React 19 + Tailwind 4 are the target stack and will not be downgraded; Admin role constant `UserRole.ADMIN` exists in the codebase (to be verified during Phase 1); Design direction is *Laboratoire éditorial* with navy/gold/bone palette and Fraunces/Inter/JetBrains Mono type system

phases.name: Baseline and build hardening
phases.goal: Stabilize the build, establish token compliance baseline, and create the foundation for modernization
phases.description: Wrap DB calls with safe wrappers, flip products to force-dynamic, initialize ESLint, add env example, inventory layout styling violations, and define the token system target before any UI changes.

steps.description: Inventory layout/page styling primitives and map violations (inline hex, non-grid spacing, missing tokens)

verification.command: grep -R "style={{" components/ app/ | head -20 && grep -R "#[0-9A-Fa-f]" components/layouts | head -20

steps.description: Wrap products search/detail in safe wrappers; switch /products to force-dynamic; guard generateStaticParams

verification.command: next build exits 0 and /products loads without DB connection warnings

steps.description: Initialize ESLint config, add typecheck script, update .env.example

phases.name: Design system primitives
phases.goal: Create the centralized design system and reusable UI primitives
phases.description: Add CSS tokens (colors, type, motion), next/font setup, and primitives (Container, SectionLabel, Button, Chip, Heading, Rule, Marquee, GrainLayer, ScrollProgress, Reveal, Magnetic).

steps.description: Create theme tokens files: theme/tokens.css, theme/motion.ts, theme/typography.ts
Wire fonts via next/font/google (Fraunces, Inter Tight, JetBrains Mono)

phases.name: Navbar and footer modernization
phases.goal: Rewrite shared layout shell to match the spec-compliant editorial aesthetic
phases.description: Rebuild NavbarClient with transparent/solid/condensed states, top strip, scroll progress, mobile drawer, and accessibility; rewrite Footer as editorial colophon with manifesto, newsletter, certifications, and parallax wordmark.

steps.description: Rewrite navbar components and supporting layout integration

verification.command: next build and visual smoke test of navbar states

steps.description: Rewrite footer components and layout integration

verification.command: next build and visual smoke test of footer sections

phases.name: Page titles and SEO metadata
phases.goal: Centralize metadata generation across all locales
phases.description: Create lib/seo helpers (title, alternates, defaults), add PageHeader pattern, and apply consistent metadata to public/account/admin pages with canonical + hreflang + x-default.

steps.description: Create lib/seo/ helpers and apply to public pages
Apply PageHeader pattern to products, about, blog, contact, account, admin

phases.name: Products page stabilization and modernization
phases.goal: Fix products reliability and modernize catalog/detail UX
phases.description: Apply safe service wrappers, modernize catalog header/filters/results/pagination/cards, add empty/error/skeleton states, modernize product detail, and harden the build.

steps.description: Stabilize products service and page data fetching

verification.command: next build and /products loads with DB unavailable fallback

steps.description: Implement modern catalog components and product detail refresh

verification.command: visual QA on /products and /products/[slug] and Lighthouse check

phases.name: Admin dashboard implementation
phases.goal: Build the initial real admin dashboard shell with guarded access
phases.description: Create (admin) route group, role guard, admin shell/sidebar/topbar, overview KPIs, data table primitives, and product/article/event admin CRUD stubs.

steps.description: Create admin route group, layout, role guard, shell, sidebar, topbar

verification.command: next build and /admin redirects non-admin, renders for admin role

steps.description: Build admin overview KPIs and data table primitives

verification.command: visual QA of /admin overview and table interactions

steps.description: Implement products admin list/new/edit and stubs for articles/events/orders/users/media/seo/settings

verification.command: next build and navigation across admin routes

phases.name: Final polish and validation
phases.goal: Validate the entire modernization across locales, RTL, responsiveness, accessibility, and performance
phases.description: Audit i18n keys, RTL layouts, a11y landmarks/focus, SEO sitemap/robots/JSON-LD, run Lighthouse, add smoke tests, and finalize CI workflow.

steps.description: i18n audit and RTL fixes across ar-MA locale

verification.command: grep -R "dir=\"rtl\"" app/ && manual ar-MA smoke test

goal: Execute the complete MM Pharma frontend modernization across the Next.js App Router, implementing the design system, navbar/footer, SEO/titles, products UX, home sections, admin dashboard, and build hardening defined in the project specs.

Build, lint, and typecheck all pass with warnings mitigated; verified by `next build`, `next lint`, and `tsc --noEmit`
RTL/responsive/a11y validated across locales; verified by Lighthouse >= 90 on key pages
constraints: No new runtime dependencies without explicit user approval
Preserve existing App Router architecture and server/client boundaries
Follow website specs in `website specs/99-rules/*` for spacing, tokens, navbar behavior, and metadata formulas
Maintain tri-locale support (`fr-MA`, `ar-MA`, `en-US`) and RTL behavior
